## Summary

Describe the problem and the behavior changed.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test:release`
- [ ] Focused tests for the changed area

## Safety And Privacy

- [ ] No credentials, databases, private memories, logs, or generated user data are included
- [ ] Side effects retain confirmation or approval boundaries
- [ ] User-visible changes are documented
